Interface IWorkspaceDomains2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase

ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that allow you to alter a domain.

[Guid("56A5E6D4-01C6-11D4-A057-00C04F6BDD84")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IWorkspaceDomains2 : IWorkspaceDomains
